+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KQ5PP55SAAVJ0V3HDJ1DGNBY
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: a180
+project: spatial-nav
+title: Delete React-side <Focusable> primitive — collapse into <FocusScope>
+---
+## What
+
+Tactical follow-up to the architecture-fix card `01KQ5PP55S`: physically delete the `<Focusable>` React primitive after the architecture collapse lands. This card is the file-level cleanup; the architecture card is the design.
+
+Per the three-peer model (`FocusLayer` / `FocusZone` / `FocusScope`), `<Focusable>` is redundant — its responsibilities (mint SpatialKey, register, render `<FocusIndicator>`, click → `spatial_focus`, claim subscription) belong in `<FocusScope>`. Once the architecture-fix card has moved that implementation into `<FocusScope>`, this card removes the now-unused file and sweeps any leftover imports.
+
+## Files to delete
+
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focusable.tsx`
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focusable.test.tsx` (if it exists; merge any unique coverage into `focus-scope.test.tsx` first)
+
+## Files to sweep for dead imports / references
+
+- All `kanban-app/ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}` — remove any `import { Focusable } from "@/components/focusable"` line that survives the architecture collapse
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/types/spatial.ts` — keep type re-exports if `<FocusScope>` itself uses them; remove anything that exists solely to support `<Focusable>`
+- Any `*.guards.node.test.ts` files that pin `<Focusable>` as a required import — update or delete them
+
+## Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Confirm `01KQ5PP55S` (architecture fix) has landed — `<FocusScope>` is now the leaf primitive
+- [ ] `rg "Focusable" kanban-app/ui/src/` — verify zero call-site uses remain
+- [ ] Delete `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focusable.tsx`
+- [ ] Delete `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focusable.test.tsx` if present (after rolling unique coverage into `focus-scope.test.tsx`)
+- [ ] Run `npx tsc --noEmit` — no broken imports
+- [ ] Run `pnpm vitest run` — all tests still pass
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focusable.tsx` does not exist
+- [ ] `rg -l "from \"@/components/focusable\"" kanban-app/ui/src/` returns no matches
+- [ ] `rg -w "Focusable" kanban-app/ui/src/` returns only matches inside docstrings or comments that explicitly reference the legacy name (e.g. "formerly Focusable") — zero usages of the symbol
+- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
+- [ ] `pnpm vitest run` — all tests pass
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Add a guard test `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focusable.absence.guard.node.test.ts` that asserts the file does not exist (`fs.existsSync` returns false). This pins the deletion against future regressions where someone re-adds the file under the same name.
+- [ ] Verify with: `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run focusable.absence.guard` — passes.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd` — write the absence-guard test first (will pass immediately if the file is gone), watch it fail in a sandbox where the file still exists, then delete the file and confirm green.
+- Don't start this card until `01KQ5PP55S` has fully landed.
\ No newline at end of file
